questions.question: Describe the main difference between a full node and a lightweight node in the Ethereum blockchain. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A lightweight node does not store a full copy of the blockchain, whereas a full node does.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'gas limit' in the Ethereum network? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The gas limit determines the maximum number of transactions that can be processed in a block.

questions.question: How does a transaction on the Ethereum blockchain get confirmed and added to a block? (5 marks)
questions.hint: A transaction is confirmed and added to a block through a process called 'mining', where a network of miners compete to solve a complex mathematical puzzle.
